allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5050 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime | Format-List })

PowerShell(try { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5050 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 1; Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime | Format-List } catch { "no listener found: $_" })
